title: Saro´s Interactive Blocks
description: Trigger server or client commands on right-click, left-click, touch, or redstone signal — for custom interactions.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_Header.webp)

![Over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_Overview.webp)
The **Saro's Interactive Blocks Mod** introduces a system that allows players to create custom block interactions in Minecraft. This includes actions such as right-clicking, left-clicking, or even touching blocks to trigger commands that can run either on the server or client-side.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_Features.webp)
- **Custom Block Actions** ⚙️  
  - Players can assign commands to specific blocks based on interactions like right-clicking, left-clicking, or touching.
  
- **Easy Command Setup** 🛠️  
  - Players can use simple commands to configure block actions directly in-game.

![Block Action Examples](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_BlockActionExamples.webp)
- **Right-Click Action (R)**: Run specific commands when a block is right-clicked.
- **Left-Click Action (L)**: Run specific commands when a block is left-clicked.
- **Touch Action (T)**: Activate commands when a player walks over a block.
- **On Redstone Action (S)**: Activate commands when the block is on redstone.

![commands](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_Commands.webp)
- `/blockaction create <side> <action> <command>`: Create a new block interaction.
- `/blockaction delete`: Remove an existing block interaction.
- `/blockaction info`: Get information about the block interaction you are looking
- (Use <player> in the command to use the name of the trigger player)

![video](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_VideoDemo.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/SGxq7dlrUCE?si=lXLwgJFHcJQaz9D7" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  
![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Interactive_Blocks/BH_IB_SupportedVersions.webp)
### Currently Supported

- **Forge/NeoForge/Fabric 26.1** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.21.5** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.21.4** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.21.1** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.21** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.20.6** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.20.4** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.20.1** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.19.4** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.19.2** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.18.2** ✅
- **Forge/Fabric 1.16.5** ✅
